name: clara-tobias-clara-roundtrip
description: Smoke test for Clara routing to Tobias, Tobias handling a field-note-to-quote scenario, and Tobias returning the caller to Clara cleanly.

userTurns.label: Field documentation scenario
userTurns.text: Tobias, turn this field note into a quote draft: leaking flat roof over 120 square meters, damaged insulation near the skylight, access by lift only.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Receptionist follow-up
userTurns.text: Clara, stay with me and show the receptionist demo.
